2604.08355.title: ASPECT:Analogical Semantic Policy Execution via Language Conditioned Transfer
2604.08355.paper_summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents often struggle to generalize knowledge to new tasks, even those structurally similar to ones they have mastered. Although recent approaches have attempted to mitigate this issue via zero-shot transfer, they are often constrained by predefined, discrete class systems, limiting their adaptability to novel or compositional task variations. We propose a significantly more generalized approach, replacing discrete latent variables with natural language conditioning via a text-conditioned Variational Autoencoder (VAE). Our core innovation utilizes a Large Language Model (LLM) as a dynamic \textit{semantic operator} at test time. Rather than relying on rigid rules, our agent queries the LLM to semantically remap the description of the current observation to align with the source task. This source-aligned caption conditions the VAE to generate an imagined state compatible with the agent's original training, enabling direct policy reuse. By harnessing the flexible reasoning capabilities of LLMs, our approach achieves zero-shot transfer across a broad spectrum of complex and truly novel analogous tasks, moving beyond the limitations of fixed category mappings. Code and videos are available \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ASPECT-85C3/}{here}.
2604.08355.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習（RL）代理通常難以將知識泛化到新任務，即使這些任務在結構上與他們已經掌握的任務相似。儘管最近的研究嘗試通過零樣本轉移來減輕這一問題，但它們往往受到預定義的離散類別系統的限制，限制了它們對新穎或組合任務變化的適應能力。我們提出了一種顯著更具泛化性的方案，通過文本條件變分自編碼器（VAE）用自然語言條件取代離散潛變量。我們的核心創新是在測試時利用大型語言模型（LLM）作為動態的\textit{語義運算符}。我們的代理不是依賴於僵化的規則，而是查詢LLM，將當前觀察的描述進行語義重映射，以便與源任務對齊。這種源對齊的標題使VAE能夠生成與代理原始訓練相容的想像狀態，從而實現直接的策略重用。通過利用LLM的靈活推理能力，我們的方法在一系列複雜且真正新穎的類比任務中實現了零樣本轉移，超越了固定類別映射的限制。代碼和視頻可在\href{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ASPECT-85C3/}{這裡}獲得。
2604.08355.author: Ajsal Shereef Palattuparambil et.al.
2604.08355.authors: Ajsal Shereef Palattuparambil, Thommen George Karimpanal, Santu Rana
